heading: CRA Form YT479 2025 Yukon Credits
body:
Title: CRA Form YT479 2025 Yukon credits.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5011-tc/5011-tc-25e.txt
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/5011-tc/5011-tc-25e.pdf
- https://www.canada.ca/en/revenue-agency/services/forms-publications/tax-packages-years/general-income-tax-benefit-package/yukon/5011-pc.html

YT479 numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 0.064
Value: 1000
Value: 500
Value: 100
Value: 0.40
Value: 10000

CRA Form YT479 2025 calculates Yukon refundable credits. Line 1 multiplies total eligible children's fitness fees on line 63800 by 6.4%. The CRA Yukon 2025 tax information page says the children's fitness tax credit can claim up to $1,000 per child for eligible fitness fees, and that a child eligible for the disability tax credit can support an additional $500 if a minimum of $100 is paid for eligible fitness expenses. Line 2 takes the research and development tax credit from Form T1232. Lines 3 and 4 take the Yukon business carbon price rebate amounts from Schedule YT(S14). Line 5 gives zero if the valid Yukon health care card condition is not met; otherwise it multiplies eligible medical expenses for fertility treatments by 40% and caps the Yukon fertility and surrogacy tax credit at $10,000. Line 6 adds lines 1 to 5 and enters Yukon credits on T1 line 47900.
